title: nervilia alishanensis
intro: Nervilia alishanensis, also known as the Alishan Nervilia or Alishan Ghost Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Taiwan. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Nervilia alishanensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Nervilia alishanensis are typically made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
